name: flow-05-branch-c-privacy-gate-post-builder
description: Branch C: T90 SocialShareGate (sole entry) → T91 QuestionnairePostBuilder. T90 emits SocialShareApproved or SocialShareSkipped. T91 triggers on SocialShareApproved only.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation: T90 sole entry, T91 trigger = SocialShareApproved (not QuestionnaireAnswered)
Retrieve privacy-gate-branch pattern for FLOW-05 Branch C
Break into: T90 (privacy check → SocialShareApproved|SocialShareSkipped) + T91 (@EventPattern('SocialShareApproved') → build post)
Generate social-share-gate.service.ts (T90) and questionnaire-post-builder.service.ts (T91). T91 @EventPattern = 'SocialShareApproved' — never 'QuestionnaireAnswered'.
Score against iron rules: T90 sole entry, T91 trigger correctness
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
